You can only enter the Clan Dungeon, as part of a command channel. To participate, its members need to belong to the same clan and be of Lv. 86 or higher. There should be 10-40 adventurers in the command channel.
Your goal is to defeat bosses as fast as possible.
Information on your dungeon progress will be recorded, a the clan rankings will be based on it.
You have 180 min. to complete the dungeon.
It resets weekly at 6:30a.m.
